note: All real, verifiable Arc Testnet activity by the agent. Explorer: https://testnet.arcscan.app

Contracts.purpose: Attests each decision cycle on Arc: thesis hash + allocation outcome (reasoning trace as on-chain artifact, cf. Arc Research #01)

autonomy: scripts/loop.ts runs cycles on an interval, attesting each to Arc — continuous recurring settlement, not a one-shot.
usycNote: USYC park (idle-capital yield on Arc) is implemented intent but BLOCKED on Circle's institutional allowlist (testnet USYC requires an approval ticket; mainnet requires non-US institutional KYC). Not faked — the agent reserves in USDC on Arc today and would route to USYC once allowlisted.
